title: Living in Boulder vlog 7 -  2 - 2018: Just gunna work on my site from now on

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a vlog update explaining he has abandoned his plan to load audiobooks onto his phone for outdoor exercise, instead deciding to focus entirely on fixing and organizing his website for the rest of the year. He details recent tech purchases (TV, Xbox, speakers, GoPro, new Mac) and explains his workflow challenges with slow computers and broken audiobook page links.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Only exercised out of fear his knee was bad; since it feels fine, he sees no reason to stop website work
Must work full time continuously or he loses context and efficiency, making only incremental progress otherwise
Excited and hopeful the new turbo boost Mac will be fast enough to handle his heavy website editing workload

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wanted to do a V-log because it's been like a week since I did a V-log.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Last time I did a V-log, I thought the plan was to put a whole bunch of audio books on my cell phone and playlists of music and then go writing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm not gonna ride or do anything; I'm gonna work on my website for the rest of the year.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The only real reason I was gonna start exercising was because my knee was hurting, but now it doesn't feel sore at all.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I had to fill up my phone a week ago and have been still working on it because I was also setting up my own house with new stuff.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got a 70-inch TV, Xbox 10, and a grant for a car racing game, but Call of Duty hasn't come in the mail yet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got a 500-watt five-speaker system that's really cool because I can blast it in my room and the neighbors can't hear it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got a new garment for free, the very best latest one, but I haven't had time to fix it up.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got a new GoPro but haven't had time for that either.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can't connect my team computer to my big TV for some reason, but I just figured out this new printer that I bought.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I realized I needed to fix the audio history books pages on my website because they were totally locked up.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's gonna take forever to fix the audio history books pages and make them the same on my computer and the MP3000 on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm curious to see how much I can actually fit on my phone because my computer has five of the devices and it can't hold all of them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My phone now has 151.26 gigabytes of space, so hopefully I can get everything on it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I don't have much more space on my Mac because the programs are using all the gigabytes.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I ordered another Mac, the best one I could find on Amazon, because they gave me a $7,000 credit.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm buying everything I need, like a wireless microphone, selfie stick, little lenses, and an iPhone case for my Mac.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I hope this new Mac is gonna be a lot faster because it has turbo boost.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to use both of my computers at the same time from now on.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: As soon as my new turbo boost computer comes in, I'm gonna start fixing all the links on all my audiobooks on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My current computer takes like a half hour to open these files and five minutes to link phones every time I try to change something.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I hope the new computer will be fast enough to handle it, but if not, maybe I can do other things like videos on the other computer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can't run the same program on two computers at the same time; it has to be different programs.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I heard with Creative Cloud, the software licensing is like that.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can do Dreamweaver on my new computer and videos on this one because before, this computer couldn't do anything while processing a video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: This computer is the top of the line from two or three years ago.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got one in 2015, but after a year it died, and they gave me another one, so this is from 2016.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I hope the new one is better, so I'm looking forward to that.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Between working on the two computers, I could do something on Google Earth or focus on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I can do a lot of good stuff this year on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The only reason I thought I was gonna start exercising was because I thought I was gonna be in trouble if I didn't.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: From my point of view, it seems kind of crazy to reduce the amount of work on my website because I work a lot more efficiently if I'm working all the time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I work a lot more efficiently if I'm working all the time because I can remember certain little things I have to remember.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Last night, I made a new link box table for my audiobooks and copied it off my education page, but it didn't work because it was in a different folder.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The links only work if they come from the same folder, so I had to do it over again.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's better to just work full time because I need to remember little things like that.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to work full time if I'm gonna make progress; if not, I'm just inching along.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I just realized I don't have my microphone plugged in, but the motor's not going, so hopefully this sounds good.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm gonna get going right now on my free audio shoot pages, and then work on the actual books on my page that need link fixes.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might get enough sense of accomplishment to go into surface-level stuff on my website, which I really need to do.
